record.text: I love learning machine learning.
record.label: general

record.text: Artificial intelligence is the future.
record.label: general

record.text: ChatGPT helps in coding and problem solving.
record.label: general

record.text: Python is a powerful programming language.
record.label: general

record.text: Data science involves statistics and programming.
record.label: general

record.text: Deep learning is a subset of machine learning.
record.label: general

record.text: Natural language processing deals with text data.
record.label: general

record.text: I really enjoyed this movie, it was fantastic!
record.label: positive

record.text: The product quality is terrible and disappointing.
record.label: negative

record.text: Amazing experience, I would definitely recommend it.
record.label: positive

record.text: Worst service ever, I am not happy at all.
record.label: negative

record.text: The food was okay, not great but not bad either.
record.label: neutral

record.text: Absolutely loved it!
record.label: positive

record.text: I hate this app, it crashes every time.
record.label: negative

record.text: User: Hi, how are you?
record.label: conversation

record.text: Bot: I am fine, how can I help you?
record.label: conversation

record.text: User: What is machine learning?
record.label: conversation

record.text: Bot: Machine learning is a field of AI that allows systems to learn from data.
record.label: conversation

record.text: User: Can you help me with Python?
record.label: conversation

record.text: Bot: Yes, I can help you with Python programming.
record.label: conversation

record.text: Machine learning is a rapidly growing field in computer science. It focuses on building systems that can learn from data and improve their performance over time without being explicitly programmed.
record.label: paragraph

record.text: Natural language processing is a branch of artificial intelligence that deals with understanding and generating human language. It is widely used in chatbots, translation systems, and voice assistants.
record.label: paragraph

record.text: Football is a popular sport played worldwide.
record.label: sports

record.text: The stock market saw a huge drop today.
record.label: finance

record.text: New AI models are being released every year.
record.label: technology

record.text: The government passed a new law.
record.label: politics

record.text: Cricket is very popular in India.
record.label: sports

record.text: Bitcoin prices are highly volatile.
record.label: finance
